---
title: ""
title-block-banner: false
toc: false

listing:
  id: latest-news
  contents: news/posts/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  max-items: 10
  fields: [date, title, description]
---

::: {.home}

::: {.hero}
```{=html}
<div class="hero-inner">

  <div class="hero-eyebrow">Seoul National University</div>

  <h1 class="hero-title">Spatial Data Science Lab</h1>

  <p class="hero-subtitle">
    Advancing spatial data science and analytics
  </p>


</div>
```
:::

::: {.feature-grid .feature-grid-4}

```{=html}
<a class="feature-card" href="team.qmd">
  <div class="feature-title">Team</div>
  <div class="feature-desc">Meet our lab members and research interests.</div>
</a>
<a class="feature-card" href="projects.qmd">
  <div class="feature-title">Projects</div>
  <div class="feature-desc">Ongoing research projects and collaborations.</div>
</a>
<a class="feature-card" href="publications.qmd">
  <div class="feature-title">Publications</div>
  <div class="feature-desc">Papers, talks, posters, and technical reports.</div>
</a>
<a class="feature-card" href="news/index.qmd">
  <div class="feature-title">News</div>
  <div class="feature-desc">Updates, announcements, and highlights.</div>
</a>
```
:::

<br>

# News

::: {#latest-news}
:::

:::
